info.english_meaning: to rip off to grind to cut into small parts
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: avayave = avayavakriyAyAm ityarTaH  ayaM dIpanAyAmapi vartate  dIpanaM prakASanam ityarTaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'piSunaH piMSate vipiMSatIti' (ni0 6111) sa hi svalpamapi pApaM vipiMSati vipuzyatItyarTa iti durgaH
